title: Business website for Jo enterprises

requirements.text: Create a responsive marketing website for “Jo enterprises” with a top navigation and the following sections/pages: Home (hero + value proposition), About, Services, and Contact.

quotes: I need you to help me create a website for business, name is Jo enterprises

acceptanceCriteria: Site displays the business name “Jo enterprises” prominently in the header/hero.
Navigation links allow moving to Home, About, Services, and Contact (via pages or anchored sections).
Layout is mobile-first and remains usable on common breakpoints (mobile/tablet/desktop).

requirements.text: Define and apply a coherent visual theme (colors, typography, spacing, and component style) appropriate for a professional business website, and use it consistently across all pages/sections.

quotes: I need you to help me create a website for business, name is Jo enterprises

acceptanceCriteria: A consistent set of typography styles (headings/body), spacing rules, and button/link styles is used across the site.
The theme avoids a default/template look by using a distinct color palette and clear hierarchy (without using blue/purple as the primary palette).

requirements.text: Add a Contact form that collects at minimum: name, email, and message, performs basic client-side validation, and submits the inquiry to the backend for storage.

quotes: I need you to help me create a website for business, name is Jo enterprises

acceptanceCriteria: Form validates required fields and shows clear English error messages.
On successful submit, the user sees a success confirmation state and the form resets.
Failed submissions show an error state without losing the user’s typed message.

requirements.text: Implement backend data storage for contact inquiries, including a stable data model, an endpoint to create an inquiry, and an endpoint to list inquiries (for future admin use).

quotes: I need you to help me create a website for business, name is Jo enterprises

acceptanceCriteria: Backend exposes a method to create/store an inquiry with timestamp and submitted fields.
Backend exposes a method to list stored inquiries.
Stored inquiries persist across canister upgrades using stable storage patterns (and a migration file only if needed by the template).

requirements.text: Add basic footer content for Jo enterprises (business name and a short tagline) and include standard website essentials: readable headings, accessible color contrast, and keyboard-navigable links and form fields.

quotes: I need you to help me create a website for business, name is Jo enterprises

acceptanceCriteria: Footer is present across the site and includes “Jo enterprises”.
All interactive elements are reachable via keyboard and have visible focus styles.
Text contrast is sufficient for readability and form fields have associated labels.

requirements.text: Add required static image assets (logo and a hero/banner visual) under frontend/public/assets/generated and render them in the site header/hero areas.

quotes: I need you to help me create a website for business, name is Jo enterprises

acceptanceCriteria: Generated images exist in frontend/public/assets/generated with the specified filenames.
The logo is displayed in the site header/navigation area.
A hero/banner image is displayed in the Home hero section without layout shifting.

constraints: Use English for all user-facing text.
Do not modify any files under frontend/src/components/ui or other immutable paths defined by the system context.
Backend must remain a single Motoko actor (single-actor architecture).
Do not add third-party authentication providers; only Internet Identity is allowed (not required for this marketing site).
Do not integrate external email/SMS/push services for the contact form submission.
nonGoals: Blog/CMS features (post editing, categories, rich content).

required: Minimal professional wordmark logo, dark text on transparent background (jo-enterprises-logo.dim_512x256.png)
Abstract business hero banner illustration with neutral modern palette (jo-enterprises-hero.dim_1600x900.png)
